---
title: "Introduction to DNAtranslate"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to DNAtranslate}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

the DNAtranslate provides utility for common tasks in analyzing DNA within R. To install this package from GitHub, use

```{r setup, eval=FALSE}
# install.packages("remotes")
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("ADC-405-S26/DNAtranslate")

```

To load the package use the following code

```{r load package, eval=FALSE}

library(DNAtranslate)

```

The package provides three functions
* 'readSequence'
* 'translateDNA'
* 'reverseSequence'
